message:
chore(tracking): update issues.jsonl, FEATURE_PARITY.md, and dossier validation report

- .beads/issues.jsonl: refresh issue statuses and metadata for recently
  closed and updated beads across the startup-ABI, benchmark, harness,
  and conformance workstreams
- FEATURE_PARITY.md: mark newly completed feature parity items
- tests/release/dossier_validation_report.v1.json: regenerate validation
  report reflecting the expanded dossier validator with release-notes
  hook, updated integrity index, and new artifact coverage

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -305,6 +305,7 @@ Current stubbed symbols (explicit deterministic contracts):
 30. Stein discrepancy monitor fixed — replaced mean-score-norm KSD (broken for deterministic inputs) with KL divergence D(current||reference) between live EWMA and calibration-frozen models; all 7 tests pass.
 31. Five additional runtime math monitors verified: Stein discrepancy (KSD goodness-of-fit), POMDP repair (belief-space policy), K-theory (contract drift), SOS invariant (Lyapunov synthesis). Total test count: 792.
 32. POSIX Batch 3: stdio file ops (27 ABI entrypoints wired via stream registry), process control (6 entrypoints under `ApiFamily::Process=17`: fork, _exit, execve, execvp, waitpid, wait), virtual memory (5 entrypoints under `ApiFamily::VirtualMemory=18`: mmap, munmap, mprotect, msync, madvise), pthread sync (15 entrypoints extending `ApiFamily::Threading`: mutex init/destroy/lock/trylock/unlock, cond init/destroy/wait/signal/broadcast, rwlock init/destroy/rdlock/wrlock/unlock), I/O multiplexing (4 entrypoints under `ApiFamily::Poll=19`: poll, ppoll, select, pselect). ApiFamily::COUNT expanded from 17 to 20. Total test count: 897.
+33. HTM fast path live — `memcpy`, `pthread_mutex_lock`, and the malloc stats combiner now route uncontended hot-path work through an RTM-backed optimistic path with deterministic abort/cooldown/fallback evidence enforced by `scripts/check_htm_fast_path.sh`.
 
 ## Update Policy

+  "release_notes_hook": {

+    "release_notes_markdown": "## Release Notes Candidates\n\n- `bd-3aof.3.1` RCU metadata benchmark matrix + artifact report wiring (task, closed 2026-04-07T22:36:34.619308324Z)\n  Implemented metadata benchmark artifact/report plumbing across the bench crate, added the metadata benchmark gate and integration test coverage, reproduced a writer-side QSBR hang in metadata_read_be\u2026\n- `bd-gtf.6` L3 full-replace claim-control gate tied to prerequisite completion (task, closed 2026-04-07T22:16:38.698922589Z)\n  Implemented the L3 release-claim gate slice in the release dossier flow: added release_notes_hook output to the validator, hardened FLC_RELEASE_DOSSIER_RELEASE_NOTES_LIMIT parsing with warning+defaul\u2026\n- `bd-3rw.1` DEPLOYMENT.md: production guide (task, closed 2026-04-07T19:37:57.961229475Z)\n  Materialized DEPLOYMENT.md as the deployment source of truth, linked README to it, updated docs governance to target DEPLOYMENT.md, regenerated docs governance artifacts, and added regression coverag\u2026\n- `bd-qwm` CRT phase-0: _start/__libc_start_main bootstrap skeleton + acceptance fixtures (task, closed 2026-04-07T19:27:25.598119230Z)\n  Acceptance fixture now passes under LD_PRELOAD in strict+hardened modes; verification matrix and evidence artifacts refreshed.\n- `bd-1sp.4` Alien CS: EBR for lock-free data structures (section 14.10) (task, closed 2026-04-07T19:01:08.160355842Z)\n  Revalidated EBR integration gate via rch exec: cargo test -p frankenlibc-membrane --test ebr_integration_test ebr_e2e_emits_structured_artifacts -- --nocapture, bash scripts/check_ebr_integration.sh,\u2026\n- `bd-249m.7` Proof: Sheaf global-consistency (task, closed 2026-04-07T18:45:17.951725563Z)\n  Added sheaf global-consistency proof note and machine-readable cover artifact, strengthened cohomology with a triple-overlap H^1=0 proof test, extended the cohomology harness test to validate open-co\u2026\n- `bd-h5x.3` Non-threading call-through elimination + enforcement CI gate (task, closed 2026-04-07T18:16:06.943344906Z)\n  Added race-free replacement-guard artifact paths, explicit policy verdict/log fields, and ranked non-threading backlog reporting with passing guard/test verification.\n- `bd-1wzq` HTM fast-path for hot libc functions (section 4.2, Score 3.0) (task, closed 2026-04-07T17:35:02.268971009Z)\n  Completed HTM fast-path verification slice: added missing pthread_mutex_lock abort/fallback regression so the three integrated HTM entrypoints now have explicit commit/abort coverage (malloc, memcpy,\u2026",
